title: cinnamomum keralaense
intro: Cinnamomum keralaense, also known as the Kerala cinnamon, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Western Ghats of India. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cinnamomum keralaense include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to make ointments, salves, and other topical preparations.
